_description: Moes UFO-R11 Universal Smart IR Remote Control (Zosung protocol)

ed00_CMD._note: Zosung IR Transmit cluster (0xed00) - 5-step command handshake, no ZCL attributes. seq wraps at 0x10000. Chunks are max 0x38 (56) bytes each.

00.fields: seq(uint16), length(uint32), unk1(uint32), unk2(uint16), unk3(uint8), cmd(uint8), unk4(uint16)
00.note: cmd=0x01 coordinator->device (send IR), cmd=0x02 device->coordinator (learn IR). length = total IR payload size.

01.fields: zero(uint8), seq(uint16), length(uint32), unk1(uint32), unk2(uint16), unk3(uint8), cmd(uint8), unk4(uint16)
01.note: Sent by coordinator to acknowledge cmd00 and request first chunk via cmd02.

02.note: Coordinator requests msgpart starting at position, up to maxlen=0x38 bytes. Repeated until all chunks received.

03.note: Carries one chunk of IR payload. msgpartcrc = XOR checksum over msgpart bytes. Reassemble chunks in order by position.

04.note: All chunks received. Coordinator sends this to signal transfer complete; device replies with cmd05.

05.note: Final ack. Reassembled buffer encodes to base64 string -> exposed as learned_ir_code widget (Text).

e004_CMD._note: Zosung IR Control cluster (0xe004) - single JSON buffer command, no ZCL attributes.

00.note: Send JSON buffer to device. Payload {"study": 0} activates IR learning mode (Switch widget).
